name: Flujo perfecto simple
yaml:
nodes:
  - id: entrada
    name: Entrada
    type: entry
    next: [menu]
  - id: menu
    name: Menu
    type: menu
    prompt: Pulse 1 ventas
    timeout: 10
    next: [ventas]
  - id: ventas
    name: Ventas
    type: transfer
    queue: ventas
    next: [salida]
  - id: salida
    name: Salida
    type: exit
